title: Lever drugster
description: reworks create/design n decor/supplementaries stepped lever to be like aeronautics throttle lever
body:
## This mod reworks analog lever from create, stepped lever from design 'n' decor, crank from supplementaries. To be like throttle lever from create:aeronautics. cranks works differently but you still can easily choose your redstone signal

you can install each mod with Lever drugster individually

this mod have optional downloads: [supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), [design n' decor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-design-n-decor), [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [create:connected
](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-connected)

_design n' decor doesnt work in 1.20.1 (it just dont work, thats problem is not on my side)_


discord - [https://discord.gg/rvmDykw23n](https://discord.gg/rvmDykw23n)
